name: TopicContextMenu
description: The actions offered for a topic, shared by the list tree, the graph, and the selected-topic panel. Renders menu items only; the surrounding menu supplies the melt context.

props.name: topic
props.description: The topic these actions apply to.

props.name: hasPayload
props.description: False for an intermediate branch node, which has no value of its own. Hides the payload and export actions.

props.name: isRetained
props.description: Whether this exact topic holds a retained message, as far as we know. Disables the clear action when false.

props.name: retainedBelowCount
props.description: How many known-retained topics sit strictly below this one. The bulk clear action is hidden when 0.

props.name: showHeader
props.description: Hide the topic header when the surrounding UI already names the topic, as the selected-topic panel does.

notes: Figma is not linked yet. Right-click does not move selection, so the header names the menu's target.
